growth_records.snippet: 23K | 0.357 | dW 1.83 (0.01) | Lactate Flux 17.84 (0.12) | Formate 2.94 (0.24) | Acetate 2.06 (0.22) | Ethanol 1.54 (0.11) mmol h-1 dW-1 ... The CDM-LAB medium contained 55.5 mM glucose.
growth_records.notes: Table 1, high growth rate. Secretion fluxes (mmol h^-1 gDW^-1) read directly from Table 1 (measured by HPLC): lactate 17.84, formate 2.94, acetate 2.06, ethanol 1.54. Dry weight X=1.83 g/L. mu=D=0.357 h^-1 at steady state; doubling time=ln2/0.357=1.94 h. Glucose feed 55.5 mM fully consumed (no residual). Glucose uptake computed: qGlc = D*S/X = 0.357 h^-1 * 55.5 mmol/L / 1.83 g/L = 10.83 mmol/gDW/h (consistency check vs products: lactate/2 + formate/2 = 8.92+1.47 = 10.4, matches). Yxs = X/glucose = 1.83 g/L / 0.0555 mol/L = 32.97 gDW/mol glucose. Product yields (mmol/gDW) also from Table 1 'mmol g-1' column. Full CDM composition referenced (refs 24,25), not tabulated in text.

growth_records.notes: Table 1, low growth rate. Measured secretion fluxes (HPLC): lactate 2.72, formate 1.06, acetate 0.72, ethanol 0.54 mmol/gDW/h. X=1.26 g/L. mu=D=0.045 h^-1; doubling time=ln2/0.045=15.40 h. Glucose 55.5 mM fully consumed; qGlc = 0.045*55.5/1.26 = 1.98 mmol/gDW/h. Yxs = 1.26 g/L / 0.0555 mol/L = 22.70 gDW/mol glucose. Shift toward mixed-acid fermentation at low growth rate (higher relative formate/acetate/ethanol). Product yields mmol/gDW from Table 1.
